original_description: Use this skill only for answer-layer self-refinement when the user needs a high-judgment final answer that is expensive to get wrong: architecture or tooling decisions, technical strategy, research synthesis, implementation plans, instruction/agent design, or important writing that will be scrutinized or directly acted on. Use when the user asks for rigor, tradeoffs, counterarguments, or a decision-ready recommendation. This does not satisfy independent review gates or replace source/test verification. Do not use for simple execution, straightforward code changes, missing-evidence investigations, or tasks where tests/source verification must happen first.
best_description: Use this skill only for answer-layer self-refinement when the user needs a high-judgment final answer that is expensive to get wrong: architecture or tooling decisions, technical strategy, research synthesis, implementation plans, instruction/agent design, or important writing that will be scrutinized or directly acted on. Use when the user asks for rigor, tradeoffs, counterarguments, or a decision-ready recommendation. This does not satisfy independent review gates or replace source/test verification. Do not use for simple execution, straightforward code changes, missing-evidence investigations, or tasks where tests/source verification must happen first.
final_description: Use this skill when the user wants a consequential answer sharpened into a defendable judgment, not when they want you to execute work. Fit intent: decide whether to proceed, choose between architecture/tooling/workflow/instruction options, critique a design or implementation plan, rewrite strategy advice for leaders, or produce a final recommendation that must withstand pushback. Trigger on requests for stricter reasoning, a clear stance, decision-ready output, go/no-go, not just pros/cons, counterarguments, risk tradeoffs, permissions, safety, verification, failure modes, maintenance cost, or conditions that would change the conclusion. Use after the relevant facts are already supplied or gathered; if missing source/docs/tests could change the answer, gather evidence first. Do not use for code edits, implementation, debugging, root-cause analysis, grep/shell help, mechanical rewrites, independent review gates, or tasks whose primary need is verification rather than judgment quality.

history.description: Use this skill only for answer-layer self-refinement when the user needs a high-judgment final answer that is expensive to get wrong: architecture or tooling decisions, technical strategy, research synthesis, implementation plans, instruction/agent design, or important writing that will be scrutinized or directly acted on. Use when the user asks for rigor, tradeoffs, counterarguments, or a decision-ready recommendation. This does not satisfy independent review gates or replace source/test verification. Do not use for simple execution, straightforward code changes, missing-evidence investigations, or tasks where tests/source verification must happen first.

train_results.query: 我需要一个严格但简短的最终回答：是否应该让 subagents 自动修复 review feedback？请考虑权限、安全、验证和失败模式。
我想让你更严格一点，不要只总结，帮我判断这个设计文档到底该不该推进，给出可 defend 的结论。
请把下面这段给 CTO 的技术策略回复改得更尖锐：不要泛泛最佳实践，要有主张、风险、反对意见和清晰推荐。
我们在考虑把 quality checks 做成 hook、slash command 还是常驻 instruction。请给我一个有条件判断的推荐，而不是只列优缺点。
我准备在团队评审会上决定 agent workflow 走 plugin、skill 还是 CLAUDE.md 规则。请给我一个能经得起严格反方审查的推荐，重点讲 tradeoff、维护成本和什么时候应该改变结论。
帮我审一下这份 implementation plan：我们要把 durable workflow baseline 推给 3 个仓库，要求别跳过证据收集和 review gate。请把它改成 decision-ready 的版本。
这个测试失败了，先帮我定位 root cause，必要时读代码和跑测试。
请用独立 agent 严格审核这个 migration 是否安全。
把 global/skills/quality-loop/SKILL.md 里的 functionName 改成 function_name。
这个代码看起来不对，先不要写建议，直接查 source 找证据。
给我一个 grep 命令，找所有 TODO。
帮我实现一个 logout button，并在浏览器里验证。

test_results.query: 下面是我写的 agent instruction，请从遵循率、冲突、过触发和输出膨胀角度做高标准改写。
这段架构判断我想发给另一个强模型 cross-review。请先帮我找最容易被攻击的假设，再压缩成一个更稳的最终建议。
我读完一个开源 repo 之后有点被 hype 带偏了。请帮我综合判断它的核心方法是不是值得迁移到我们的 agent tooling，并明确哪些证据不足。
这个 PR 方案会影响多个团队的执行流程。请给一个可以直接用于决策的 recommendation，并说明你最不确定的前提。
请 review 当前 diff 是否满足项目 review gate，并给出 PASS/FAIL。
把这段 markdown 的标题层级统一一下，不要改内容。
运行 npm test 看看现在过不过。
读一下这个 API spec，然后告诉我有哪些 endpoint。只要列表。

history.description: Use this skill for decision-quality final answers, not execution. Invoke when the user wants a strict, defensible judgment, go/no-go recommendation, critique of a plan/design/document, strategy/tooling/architecture choice, or high-stakes writing that must survive scrutiny from leaders or reviewers. Especially use for requests to be “stricter,” “not just summarize,” avoid generic best practices, produce a decision-ready or defendable conclusion, sharpen an executive/CTO reply, or weigh tradeoffs, risks, counterarguments, safety, permissions, verification, failure modes, maintenance cost, and conditions that would change the recommendation. Use after required facts are available; gather source/docs/tests first if missing evidence could change the answer. Do not use for mechanical edits, straightforward implementation, debugging/root-cause investigation, independent review gates, shell commands, or tasks whose main need is verification rather than judgment refinement.

history.description: Use this skill for answer-quality escalation when the user is asking for judgment, not action. Trigger on requests to be stricter/更严格, not merely summarize/不要只总结, make something defensible/可 defend, decision-ready, go/no-go, sharper for leaders/reviewers, or turn a plan/design/strategy into a clear recommendation. Best fits: architecture/tooling/workflow choices, implementation-plan critique, technical strategy, agent/instruction design, high-stakes written replies, and any answer that must weigh tradeoffs, risks, counterarguments, permissions, safety, verification, failure modes, maintenance cost, or conditions that would change the conclusion. Use only after enough facts are available; gather source/docs/tests first if missing evidence could change the recommendation. Do not use for mechanical edits, implementation, shell commands, debugging/root-cause work, independent review gates, or tasks whose main need is verification rather than judgment refinement.

history.description: Use this skill for judgment hardening: when the user wants a stricter, sharper, decision-ready answer rather than execution. Invoke for “是否应该/该不该”, “更严格”, “不要只总结/别只列优缺点”, “可 defend/经得起反方审查”, go/no-go, CTO/leader-facing strategy replies, or critiques of plans/designs/workflows that need a clear recommendation. Best for architecture/tooling/workflow/agent-instruction choices and high-stakes written recommendations where the answer must weigh tradeoffs, risks, counterarguments, permissions, safety, verification, failure modes, maintenance cost, and conditions that would change the conclusion. Use only after necessary facts are available; gather source/docs/tests first if they could change the answer. Do not use for implementation, mechanical edits, shell commands, debugging/root-cause work, independent code/security/migration review gates, or tasks whose main need is verification.

我准备在团队评审会上决定 agent workflow 走 plugin、skill 还是 CLAUDE.md 规则。请给我一个能经得起严格反方审查的推荐，重点讲 tradeoff、维护成本和什么时候应该改变结论。
把 global/skills/quality-loop/SKILL.md 里的 functionName 改成 function_name。

test_results.query: 下面是我写的 agent instruction，请从遵循率、冲突、过触发和输出膨胀角度做高标准改写。
我读完一个开源 repo 之后有点被 hype 带偏了。请帮我综合判断它的核心方法是不是值得迁移到我们的 agent tooling，并明确哪些证据不足。
这段架构判断我想发给另一个强模型 cross-review。请先帮我找最容易被攻击的假设，再压缩成一个更稳的最终建议。
这个 PR 方案会影响多个团队的执行流程。请给一个可以直接用于决策的 recommendation，并说明你最不确定的前提。
请 review 当前 diff 是否满足项目 review gate，并给出 PASS/FAIL。
把这段 markdown 的标题层级统一一下，不要改内容。
运行 npm test 看看现在过不过。
读一下这个 API spec，然后告诉我有哪些 endpoint。只要列表。

results.query: 我想让你更严格一点，不要只总结，帮我判断这个设计文档到底该不该推进，给出可 defend 的结论。
请把下面这段给 CTO 的技术策略回复改得更尖锐：不要泛泛最佳实践，要有主张、风险、反对意见和清晰推荐。
我需要一个严格但简短的最终回答：是否应该让 subagents 自动修复 review feedback？请考虑权限、安全、验证和失败模式。
我们在考虑把 quality checks 做成 hook、slash command 还是常驻 instruction。请给我一个有条件判断的推荐，而不是只列优缺点。
这个测试失败了，先帮我定位 root cause，必要时读代码和跑测试。
